    _children(MetricKeeper...) - Method in class gametree.DepthFirstNode
     
    _children(MetricKeeper...) - Method in class gametree.DepthFirstNode.RootDFNode
    This implementation stores the children of the root node only, only the root node will be of the type DepthFirstNode.RootDFNode, whereas all children will be of the type DepthFirstNode which does not store children in memory.
